metadata.name: Set a Tuning Profile
metadata.description: Tune system performance by selecting an appropriate tuning profile
objectives: Persistently switch to a new tuning profile

hosts.name: servera
hosts.description: Target server for tuning profile configuration

tasks.name: Verify tuned package is installed
tasks.description: The tuned package must be installed on servera
tasks.failure_message: The tuned package is not installed
hints: Install with: sudo dnf install tuned

tasks.name: Verify tuned service is enabled
tasks.description: The tuned service must be enabled to start at boot
tasks.failure_message: The tuned service is not enabled
hints: Enable with: sudo systemctl enable tuned

tasks.name: Verify tuned service is running
tasks.description: The tuned service must be running
tasks.failure_message: The tuned service is not running
hints: Start with: sudo systemctl start tuned

tasks.name: Verify latency-performance profile is active
tasks.description: The latency-performance tuning profile must be the active profile
tasks.failure_message: The latency-performance profile is not active
hints: Set profile with: sudo tuned-adm profile latency-performance
List available profiles with: tuned-adm list

tasks.name: Verify vm.dirty_ratio is set to 10
tasks.description: The vm.dirty_ratio kernel parameter should be 10 (from latency-performance profile)
tasks.failure_message: vm.dirty_ratio is not set to the expected value of 10
hints: This value is set by the latency-performance profile
If profile is correct but value is wrong, try: sudo tuned-adm profile latency-performance

tasks.name: Verify vm.swappiness is set to 10
tasks.description: The vm.swappiness kernel parameter should be 10 (from latency-performance profile)
tasks.failure_message: vm.swappiness is not set to the expected value of 10
hints: This value is set by the latency-performance profile
Run: tuned-adm verify to check if settings match profile
